phase_name: Phase 10 agent integration and scenario hardening

completed_tasks.name: Scenario hardening
completed_tasks.progress: Scenario 01 (`scenario-settings-search-back`) and the real Scenario 02 (`scenario-settings-home-screenshot`) are implemented in scripts/ghosthand-verify-runtime.sh and both passed on-device. The runtime verification workflow doc was updated to reflect Scenario 01 and Scenario 02, but those changes are not committed yet.

blockers.description: No new runtime blocker is open from Scenario 01 or Scenario 02; current remaining work is Phase 10 scenario/operator hardening only
blockers.workaround: Continue from the current accepted Phase 09 baseline and the now-proven scenario runner layer.

blockers.description: On this ROM, runtime restore may still require the app-owned runtime start control before /ping is available
blockers.workaround: Use the restore-runtime flow already encoded in scripts/ghosthand-verify-runtime.sh.

decisions.decision: Phase 09 stays frozen and accepted unless a real regression appears
decisions.rationale: Phase 10 work should harden agent usability and scenarios, not reopen endpoint-level polish.
System surfaces are repeatable and reduce scenario noise while the scenario layer is being built.

decisions.decision: Scenario 02 screenshot confirmation uses waited-for launcher transition plus materially different screenshot response size
decisions.rationale: The route already returns PNG data reliably, and response-size difference is the stable low-risk visual confirmation rule on this device.

next_action: Resume by reviewing the uncommitted Scenario 02 runner and workflow doc changes, then continue Phase 10 Stage 2 with Scenario 03 (`notification read -> navigation`) only, keeping the scope bounded and preserving the accepted Phase 09 baseline.
context_notes: Phase 10 has started. Stage 1 is done through the /commands contract hardening commit. Stage 2 is active: Scenario 01 passed on-device, and the real Scenario 02 was corrected, implemented, and passed on-device using the chain Settings -> baseline screenshot -> /home + /wait -> home screenshot with screenshot-confirmed evidence. The repo is clean except for the runner/doc updates for these scenario additions.
